intended_review_use: Batoka isolated-family 50 m macro rock-surface comparison on project-owned geometry

source.title: Aerial Rocks 02
source.author: Rob Tuytel
source.acquisition_method: individual official Poly Haven 4K JPG download links

review_boundaries.capture_orientation: publisher aerial source reoriented only for isolated vertical-wall comparison
allowed_now: fixed-camera turntable, closeup, and 60 m review captures
blocked_now: claiming the source was captured at Batoka Gorge
claiming an exact basalt or named-outcrop match
using it as terrain, bed, bank, collision, water, GeoClaw, forcing, or raft-contact authority
corridor substitution before isolated visual acceptance
production promotion before geology, guide, rights, art, repetition, and performance review

import.texture_policy: 4K diffuse remains sRGB; AO, displacement, and roughness import as linear masks; DirectX normal imports without green-channel inversion
import.promotion_policy: manual only after isolated surface, morphology, geology, guide, rights, art, repetition, and performance review
